mechanism_narrative: A sustained low federal funds rate reduces corporate borrowing costs and compresses equity discount rates, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are not significantly higher than baseline during low-rate periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 9.5 percent, consumer spending power collapses and corporate earnings forecasts are downgraded, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in greater than 55% of instances where UNRATE exceeds the 9.5% threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts signals synchronized consumer and capital expenditure recovery, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Joint positive signals in RSAFS and HOUST yield negative forward returns in greater than 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during a post-crisis liquidity injection phase indicates factory utilization recovery and inventory restocking, driving positive short-term S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases fail to predict positive 5-day returns when FEDFUNDS is below 0.25%.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth above zero confirms economic expansion and supports corporate revenue trajectories, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Positive GDP growth correlates with negative 60-day forward returns in greater than 50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly CPI inflation crossing above 0.4 percent forces the Federal Reserve to delay further easing, raising real discount rates and triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL spikes above 0.4% MoM coincide with positive 20-day returns in greater than 65% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence where payroll employment rises while the unemployment rate falls confirms labor market tightening and wage growth expectations, producing positive short-term S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Combined PAYEMS increase and UNRATE decrease yield negative 5-day returns in greater than 55% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts below 600 thousand units during a credit-constrained environment signal persistent balance sheet deleveraging and weak construction sector earnings, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: HOUST values below 600k predict positive 60-day returns in greater than 60% of observations.
